name: ngu-go-mod-companion
description: NGU GO Mod Companion Chrome extension

scripts.zip: node -e "const fs=require('fs'), cp=require('child_process'), p=require('./package.json'), dir=p.name+'-v'+p.version; fs.mkdirSync(dir, {recursive:true}); const targets=['LICENSE', 'README.md', 'manifest.json', 'src', 'icons', 'img']; targets.forEach(t => { if(fs.existsSync(t)) { fs.cpSync(t, dir+'/'+t, {recursive:true}); } }); try { cp.execSync('npx bestzip ' + dir + '.zip ' + dir, {stdio:'inherit'}); } finally { fs.rmSync(dir, {recursive:true, force:true}); }"
scripts.build: npm run format && npm run lint:fix && npm run zip
